code: import{useParams}from"react-router-dom";import useFetch from"./fetchdata.js";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import"./index.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Details=()=>{const{status,id}=useParams();console.log(status,id);const navigate=useNavigate();const{Data,Ispending,Iserror}=useFetch('http://localhost:8000/TaskUploads/'+id);const handledelete=()=>{fetch("http://localhost:8000/TaskUploads"+Data.id,{method:"DELETE",headers:{"ngrok-skip-browser-warning":"true"}}).then(()=>{navigate("/");});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"TaskDetails",children:[Ispending&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading..."}),Iserror&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:Iserror}),Data&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:Data.TaskName}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Status : ",Data.Taskstatus]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:Data.TaskDetails})]}),Data.Taskstatus!=="Completed"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handledelete,children:"Delete"}),Data.Taskstatus!=="Completed"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>navigate(`/homepage/${Data.Taskstatus}/edit/${id}`),children:"Edit Task "})]});};export default Details;
